description: Supplier invoice header table for Oracle Accounts Payable. Each record represents an invoice, debit memo, credit memo, expense report, or prepayment entered for a supplier and holds the supplier reference, payment attributes, accounting context, approval status, tax information, and purchase order linkage used throughout the procure-to-pay process.

columns.name: INVOICE_ID
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the supplier invoice. Used to relate the invoice header to lines, distributions, payment schedules, and payment history.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that last updated the record.

columns.name: VENDOR_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the supplier master record associated with the transaction.

columns.name: INVOICE_NUM
columns.description: Supplier invoice number entered by the supplier and used as the primary business reference.

columns.name: SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
columns.description: Ledger identifier in which accounting entries are recorded.

columns.name: INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.description: Currency in which the supplier invoice was entered.

columns.name: PAYMENT_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.description: Currency used when payment is made or settled.

columns.name: PAYMENT_CROSS_RATE
columns.description: Cross-currency rate used when invoice and payment currencies differ.

columns.name: INVOICE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Total invoice amount entered before payment settlement.

columns.name: VENDOR_SITE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the supplier site associated with the transaction.

columns.name: AMOUNT_PAID
columns.description: Total amount already paid against the supplier invoice.

columns.name: DISCOUNT_AMOUNT_TAKEN
columns.description: Discount amount taken at the time of payment settlement.

columns.name: INVOICE_DATE
columns.description: Date printed on the supplier invoice or receivables document.

columns.name: SOURCE
columns.description: Source that created the transaction, such as manual entry, import, or another Oracle process.

columns.name: INVOICE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup code identifying the invoice type, such as standard invoice, credit memo, debit memo, or prepayment.

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Free-text business description entered to explain the purpose or content of the transaction.

columns.name: BATCH_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the import, entry, or processing batch that grouped the transaction.

columns.name: AMOUNT_APPLICABLE_TO_DISCOUNT
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier invoice used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: TAX_AMOUNT
columns.description: Total tax amount calculated for the transaction.

columns.name: TERMS_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the payment terms definition applied to the transaction.

columns.name: TERMS_DATE
columns.description: Date used as the basis for calculating payment due dates and discount dates.

columns.name: PAYMENT_METHOD_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup code identifying the method used to settle the transaction.

columns.name: PAY_GROUP_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying pay group lookup for the record.

columns.name: ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: Liability account combination charged for the supplier invoice or payment accounting entry.

columns.name: PAYMENT_STATUS_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether the invoice or schedule is unpaid, partially paid, fully paid, or otherwise settled.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that created the record.

columns.name: BASE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Functional currency amount derived from the entered transaction amount.

columns.name: VAT_CODE
columns.description: Tax classification code applied to the transaction.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.description: Login session identifier that performed the last update.

columns.name: EXCLUSIVE_PAYMENT_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether exclusive payment applies to the record.

columns.name: PO_HEADER_ID
columns.description: Purchase order header referenced by the matched transaction.

columns.name: FREIGHT_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing freight for the transaction.

columns.name: GOODS_RECEIVED_DATE
columns.description: Date on which the goods or services were received.

columns.name: INVOICE_RECEIVED_DATE
columns.description: Date on which Accounts Payable received the supplier invoice.

columns.name: VOUCHER_NUM
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence voucher.

columns.name: APPROVED_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing approved for the transaction.

columns.name: RECURRING_PAYMENT_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related recurring payment record.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_RATE
columns.description: Exchange rate used to convert the foreign currency transaction to functional currency.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE
columns.description: Conversion rate type used to derive the exchange rate for the transaction.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_DATE
columns.description: Date used to derive the foreign currency conversion rate.

columns.name: EARLIEST_SETTLEMENT_DATE
columns.description: Earliest date on which the transaction can be settled.

columns.name: ORIGINAL_PREPAYMENT_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing original prepayment for the transaction.

columns.name: DOC_SEQUENCE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the document sequencing definition used to assign the transaction number.

columns.name: DOC_SEQUENCE_VALUE
columns.description: Stored value associated with doc sequence.

columns.name: DOC_CATEGORY_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying doc category for the record.

columns.name: APPROVAL_STATUS
columns.description: Current approval status of the transaction within Oracle workflow or validation processing.

columns.name: APPROVAL_DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Descriptive text explaining approval.

columns.name: INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_TOTAL
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier invoice used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: POSTING_STATUS
columns.description: Status value showing the current processing state of posting.

columns.name: PREPAY_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether prepay applies to the record.

columns.name: AUTHORIZED_BY
columns.description: User or approver responsible for authorizing the transaction.

columns.name: CANCELLED_DATE
columns.description: Date on which the transaction was cancelled.

columns.name: CANCELLED_BY
columns.description: User or person responsible for cancelled.

columns.name: CANCELLED_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing cancelled for the transaction.

columns.name: TEMP_CANCELLED_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing temp cancelled for the transaction.

columns.name: PROJECT_ACCOUNTING_CONTEXT
columns.description: Project accounting context used to derive project-related charging and accounting behavior.

columns.name: USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying ussgl transaction for the record.

columns.name: USSGL_TRX_CODE_CONTEXT
columns.description: Context value used to interpret the USSGL transaction code for federal reporting.

columns.name: PROJECT_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the project charged by the transaction.

columns.name: TASK_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the task charged by the project-related transaction.

columns.name: EXPENDITURE_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control expenditure processing.

columns.name: EXPENDITURE_ITEM_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with expenditure item.

columns.name: PA_QUANTITY
columns.description: Quantity associated with pa for the transaction.

columns.name: EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related expenditure organization record.

columns.name: PA_DEFAULT_DIST_CCID
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier invoice used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: VENDOR_PREPAY_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing vendor prepay for the transaction.

columns.name: PAYMENT_AMOUNT_TOTAL
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier invoice used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: AWT_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether awt applies to the record.

columns.name: AWT_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the withholding tax group applied to the transaction.

columns.name: REFERENCE_1
columns.description: Reference value used for integration, reconciliation, or business traceability.

columns.name: REFERENCE_2
columns.description: Reference value used for integration, reconciliation, or business traceability.

columns.name: ORG_ID
columns.description: Operating unit identifier that owns the transaction in a multi-org Oracle EBS environment.

columns.name: PRE_WITHHOLDING_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing pre withholding for the transaction.

columns.name: AUTO_TAX_CALC_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether auto tax calc applies to the record.

columns.name: PAYMENT_CROSS_RATE_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control payment cross rate processing.

columns.name: PAYMENT_CROSS_RATE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with payment cross rate.

columns.name: PAY_CURR_INVOICE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing pay curr invoice for the transaction.

columns.name: MRC_BASE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing mrc base for the transaction.

columns.name: MRC_EXCHANGE_RATE
columns.description: Rate used to calculate or value mrc exchange for the transaction.

columns.name: MRC_EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control mrc exchange rate processing.

columns.name: MRC_EXCHANGE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with mrc exchange.

columns.name: GL_DATE
columns.description: Accounting date used when posting the transaction to General Ledger.

columns.name: AWARD_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the award or grant associated with the transaction.

columns.name: PAID_ON_BEHALF_EMPLOYEE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related paid on behalf employee record.

columns.name: AMT_DUE_CCARD_COMPANY
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier invoice used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: AMT_DUE_EMPLOYEE
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier invoice used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: APPROVAL_READY_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether the transaction is ready to enter the approval workflow.

columns.name: APPROVAL_ITERATION
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier invoice used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: WFAPPROVAL_STATUS
columns.description: Workflow approval status recorded for the transaction or line.

columns.name: REQUESTER_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the employee or user who requested the expense or purchase-related transaction.

columns.name: VALIDATION_REQUEST_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related validation request record.

columns.name: VALIDATED_TAX_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing validated tax for the transaction.

columns.name: QUICK_CREDIT
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier invoice used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: CREDITED_INVOICE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the original invoice that was credited by this transaction.

columns.name: DISTRIBUTION_SET_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the predefined distribution set used to default accounting information.

columns.name: APPLICATION_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related application record.

columns.name: PRODUCT_TABLE
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier invoice used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: REFERENCE_KEY1
columns.description: Reference value used for integration, reconciliation, or business traceability.

columns.name: REFERENCE_KEY2
columns.description: Reference value used for integration, reconciliation, or business traceability.

columns.name: REFERENCE_KEY3
columns.description: Reference value used for integration, reconciliation, or business traceability.

columns.name: REFERENCE_KEY4
columns.description: Reference value used for integration, reconciliation, or business traceability.

columns.name: REFERENCE_KEY5
columns.description: Reference value used for integration, reconciliation, or business traceability.

columns.name: TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT
columns.description: Total tax liability associated with the transaction.

columns.name: SELF_ASSESSED_TAX_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing self assessed tax for the transaction.

columns.name: TAX_RELATED_INVOICE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related tax related invoice record.

columns.name: TRX_BUSINESS_CATEGORY
columns.description: Business transaction category used by tax or compliance processing.

columns.name: USER_DEFINED_FISC_CLASS
columns.description: User-defined fiscal classification applied for tax determination and reporting.

columns.name: TAXATION_COUNTRY
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier invoice used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: DOCUMENT_SUB_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control document sub processing.

columns.name: SUPPLIER_TAX_INVOICE_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence supplier tax invoice nu.

columns.name: SUPPLIER_TAX_INVOICE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with supplier tax invoice.

columns.name: SUPPLIER_TAX_EXCHANGE_RATE
columns.description: Rate used to calculate or value supplier tax exchange for the transaction.

columns.name: TAX_INVOICE_RECORDING_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with tax invoice recording.

columns.name: TAX_INVOICE_INTERNAL_SEQ
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier invoice used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the legal entity responsible for the transaction.

columns.name: HISTORICAL_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether historical applies to the record.

columns.name: FORCE_REVALIDATION_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether force revalidation applies to the record.

columns.name: BANK_CHARGE_BEARER
columns.description: Indicates which party bears bank charges associated with the payment or receipt settlement.

columns.name: REMITTANCE_MESSAGE1
columns.description: Remittance advice message communicated to the supplier during payment processing.

columns.name: REMITTANCE_MESSAGE2
columns.description: Remittance advice message communicated to the supplier during payment processing.

columns.name: REMITTANCE_MESSAGE3
columns.description: Remittance advice message communicated to the supplier during payment processing.

columns.name: UNIQUE_REMITTANCE_IDENTIFIER

columns.name: URI_CHECK_DIGIT
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier invoice used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: SETTLEMENT_PRIORITY
columns.description: Priority used by payment processing to determine the order of settlement.

columns.name: PAYMENT_REASON_CODE
columns.description: Business reason code associated with the payment or settlement instruction.

columns.name: PAYMENT_REASON_COMMENTS
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier invoice used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE
columns.description: Payment method used to settle the transaction.

columns.name: DELIVERY_CHANNEL_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying delivery channel for the record.

columns.name: QUICK_PO_HEADER_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related quick po header record.

columns.name: NET_OF_RETAINAGE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether net of retainage applies to the record.

columns.name: RELEASE_AMOUNT_NET_OF_TAX
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier invoice used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: CONTROL_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing control for the transaction.

columns.name: PARTY_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the Trading Community Architecture party associated with the record.

columns.name: PARTY_SITE_ID
columns.description: Party site associated with the supplier, customer, or payment record.

columns.name: PAY_PROC_TRXN_TYPE_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying pay proc trxn type for the record.

columns.name: PAYMENT_FUNCTION
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier invoice used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: CUST_REGISTRATION_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying cust registration for the record.

columns.name: CUST_REGISTRATION_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence cust registration nu.

columns.name: PORT_OF_ENTRY_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying port of entry for the record.

columns.name: EXTERNAL_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the external supplier or customer bank account used for settlement.

columns.name: VENDOR_CONTACT_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related vendor contact record.

columns.name: INTERNAL_CONTACT_EMAIL

columns.name: DISC_IS_INV_LESS_TAX_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether disc is inv less tax applies to the record.

columns.name: EXCLUDE_FREIGHT_FROM_DISCOUNT
columns.description: Indicates whether freight charges are excluded when payment discounts are calculated.

columns.name: PAY_AWT_GROUP_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related pay awt group record.

columns.name: ORIGINAL_INVOICE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing original invoice for the transaction.

columns.name: DISPUTE_REASON
columns.description: Business reason captured for dispute.

columns.name: REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with remit to supplier.

columns.name: REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related remit to supplier record.

columns.name: REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_SITE
columns.description: Supplier site to which payment remittance is directed.

columns.name: REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_SITE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related remit to supplier site record.

columns.name: RELATIONSHIP_ID

columns.name: PO_MATCHED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether po matched applies to the record.

columns.name: VALIDATION_WORKER_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related validation worker record.

columns.name: PAY_GROUP_LOOKUP_CODE#1
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying pay group lookup for the record. Source metadata export included this as a repeated occurrence of the same business attribute.

business_questions: Show unpaid supplier invoices by supplier and due date.
Find invoices pending approval or validation.
List invoices matched to purchase orders.
Show cancelled invoices and cancellation amounts.
Find invoices received but not yet fully paid.
Display invoice aging by supplier or operating unit.
Show invoices with tax amounts and payment status.
Identify high-value invoices above an approval threshold.
List prepayment invoices and their remaining balances.
Show invoice headers with supplier site and remittance details.
